overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Viking-themed game showing a character walking through a snowy coastal settlement. The character moves from a fenced village path through a wooden gate onto a harbor dock where a large beached whale lies among fishing nets and wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village path with wooden fences and thatched buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy snow-covered path toward the village gate

notable_agents.action: villager in red cloak walking ahead on the path toward the gate

entered.detail: large wooden archway gate with vertical posts and crossbeams
traditional wooden building with steep thatched roof covered in snow
rough wooden plank fence lining the path
muddy path with patches of snow and ice

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy path lined with wooden fences and traditional thatched-roof buildings. The path leads toward a large wooden gate structure in the distance, with a few villagers visible walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing through village gate toward harbor

events.description: passing through the large wooden gate structure as the harbor view opens up ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate as the path opens toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: villager in red cloak walking ahead toward the dock area

entered.detail: distant view of the water and ships beyond the village
wooden planking beginning to appear on the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the wooden gate, leaving the enclosed village path behind. The scene opens up to reveal the harbor ahead, with wooden dock planks beginning to replace the dirt path. The sky becomes fully visible as the character emerges from the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock with nets and beached whale

events.description: large beached whale becomes visible on the right side of the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock past fishing nets and the massive beached whale

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the head of the beached whale
villager walking while carrying a bundle of goods

entered.detail: massive gray whale carcass beached on the wooden dock with visible baleen
large hemp fishing nets draped over wooden poles and scaffolding
rough wooden scaffolding and drying racks for fishing equipment
Viking longship with striped sail visible in the harbor water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open wooden dock, surrounded by fishing nets and scaffolding. At around 50 seconds, a massive beached whale comes into view on the right, dominating the scene. Other villagers are seen working and walking along the dock, with a longship visible in the harbor waters beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined snowy village path that opens into a wide, bustling harbor. It begins by following a character along a narrow trail lined with wooden fences and thatched-roof buildings, moving steadily toward a large wooden gate. As the character passes through this gateway, the enclosed passage gives way to an expansive view of the sky and the harbor, with the dirt path transitioning into weathered wooden dock planks. The scene then expands across the open waterfront, passing through fishing nets and scaffolding before a massive beached whale comes into view on the right. Finally, the camera continues along the dock past working villagers, revealing a longship anchored in the waters beyond.
